basics.name: Nithilan Kumaran
basics.label: HighSchool Student
basics.summary: I’m Nithilan, a curious and creative high school student from Detroit, Michigan. I love learning new things and programming cool stuff. I’m especially interested in game development and artificial intelligence. I have experience with Python, lua, HTML, Java, and PHP. I am always intrested to learn more and expand my horizons

work.name: Neureal LLC
work.summary: Currently working as a Software Engineering Intern for Neureal ,LLC . During my internship ,I was responsible for creating an Items shop using Lua code for the Space knights game created in Roblox platform. I also worked on both the User experience and UI part of the game. I uploaded hundreds of animations and also participated in testing multiple games developed by the company in different gaming platforms prior to release to users.
work.name: One Suryan
work.summary: As Executive Director and Content Developer of One Suryan https://suryan.org/, I developed the website content. In the span of a year, through my leadership we have developed 1000+ streams of our podcast, 100k+ total impressions on our Instagram page alone, published 40 works of literature, hosted webinars,and released multiple interviews.This website One Suryan is a youth-led, global 501(c)(3) that my peers and I initiated to uplift South Asian youth by promoting intersectional activism through digital advocacy, and strives to showcase diversity and representation in the South Asian community.

awards.title: Nobel Prize in Physics
awards.summary: The Nobel Prizes are five separate prizes that, according to Alfred Nobel's will of 1895, are awarded to 'those who, during the preceding year, have conferred the greatest benefit to humankind.'
